I am going to travel abroad.
Next month I am going to visit Italy.
We are going to book a flight tomorrow.
Do not worry, I will help you pack.
I think the trip will be amazing.
So, what are your plans for your next trip?
Next month I am going to travel abroad. My destination is a city by the sea.
That sounds exciting! Did you book your flight yet?
Yes, I booked a flight in advance, so it was cheap. I am going to plan my accommodation near the center.
Nice! Do you have an itinerary for each day?
I will write a simple one, with time for sightseeing. My budget is small, but it will be a great adventure.

Good morning, travelers, and welcome to today's planning tips. Before your next trip, think about three things. First, choose your destination and book a flight in advance, because early tickets are cheaper. Second, plan your accommodation near the center, so you save time. Third, write a simple itinerary for each day, with time for sightseeing and time to rest. Remember your budget, and do not try to see everything in one day. A good plan today means a relaxed trip tomorrow. We hope you are going to have a wonderful adventure abroad.

Next month I am going to take a big trip, and I am very excited. My destination is a small city by the sea. I already booked a flight in advance, so the ticket was cheap. I am going to stay in a hotel near the center, and I will plan my accommodation carefully. Each day I am going to follow a simple itinerary, with time for sightseeing in the morning and time to rest in the afternoon. My budget is small, but I think it will be an amazing adventure. I can't wait to go abroad again.

First, Roberto is going to choose his destination for the next trip. Then he will book a flight in advance to get a cheaper ticket. Next, he is going to plan his accommodation near the center. After that, he will write a simple itinerary with time for sightseeing. Finally, he is going to check his budget before the big adventure abroad.
